commands.review_summary:
The PR preserves safe Discord timing fields through QA artifact redaction, adds summary RTT plus gateway RSS/heap checkpoint metrics, and records the RTT audit notes.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main’s redacted Discord observed-message artifact branch drops the timing fields the RTT importer needs, and the branch adds focused tests for the corrected contract. I did not run the test suite in this read-only review.
